channel.title: Family-Culture on Picnic Spoons
channel.description: Recent content in Family-Culture on Picnic Spoons

item.title: The Little House Series by Laura Ingalls Wilder
item.description: Notes on The Little House books, their vision of family life, work, self-reliance, childhood, and the rhythms of a household shaped by the seasons.

item.title: What Gets Passed Down
item.description: Notes on inheritance beyond genetics: books, habits, songs, recipes, stories, educational values, emotional patterns, and ways of seeing the world.
